summary: Introduce authoritative map topology definitions and read queries
acceptance_criteria: Define serializable static topology definitions for District polygon anchors/metadata, route endpoints, explicit route edges, route modes, capacity, seasonality, terrain/risk classes, and stable topology/content hash boundaries.
No row/column/grid-derived adjacency or authority distance remains in the new topology path; old fixture helpers may remain only as legacy tests or explicit debug inputs.

Expose read/query surfaces that let UI and AI inspect districts, route edges, path preview reason codes, capacity, seasonal cost, blocked/no-known-route states, and deterministic tie-break evidence without mutating WorldState.
Preserve sim-core isolation from React, Pixi, DOM, Electron, Node file IO, Math.random, Date.now, and render-frame timing.
Specify save/load handling for topology hash and old saves: migrate if safe or return structured rejection without corrupting existing saves.
notes: This task touches public topology, protocol, and save boundaries and must follow ADR-010.
It must not implement client rendering, final art, historical formal map content, or M8 campaign feature expansion.
